_comment: Tunable constants (design §11, §14). These are STARTING points to calibrate in-tool — not settled. Everything here is editable live in the tuning panel; this file is just the boot defaults.

display._comment: F (floor) and C (saturation) are FIXED constants, never frame-derived (design §2). Linear is the default mode; log is a toggle. gain is the linear G slider.

emissive._comment: Faster falloff p>2 → near-range confirm. Bars displayed against a fixed linear ceiling (displayMax), keeping the fixed-constant discipline rather than re-normalizing per frame.

sensor._comment: Angle and range are INDEPENDENT here (the PoC's narrow-arc→+range bonus is dropped as a test-bed artifact, design §11).

mobile._comment: Design §11 settled: constant transit speed; extents are per-path ranges the placement/generation slider draws from (design §7.2, §9).

creatures._comment: Design §7.4: jitterRadius = (1 - coherence) * spreadKm; sim/creatures.js has the full flux/decoherence formula. sizeMin/Max reuses the static-organic size convention (§6.3).
